query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white photograph showing a leafless tree with branching limbs visible through a textured, translucent surface covered in water droplets and streaks. The tree occupies the upper left quadrant, while the lower right shows a dark, granular slope of material with scattered circular highlights. Small dark specks are distributed across the entire frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, dreamlike black-and-white image where a leafless tree dissolves into a misty, indistinct background, viewed through a rain-streaked or soiled translucent surface with water droplets and smeared grime. The scene is oppressively flat and low in contrast, with crushed tonal range that collapses depth into murky gray shadows. The granular, ill-defined textures and surreal layering of organic and surface elements create an abstract, subconscious atmosphere where representation dissolves into mood and formal gesture.
